# Redeeming Points

In the loyalty program, points are redeemed in increments of one hundred, translating to a five-dollar credit at checkout. Redemptions are not eligible for use with clearance pricing, and any credit obtained will be lost if the corresponding order is returned. Additionally, points will expire eighteen months after being earned, if they remain unused.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#redeeming-points]
